query:
SELECT email, status, subscribedAt FROM subscribers 
WHERE email IN (
  'giovanni.rossi@ing.it',
  'a.arienti@3dnextech.com',
  'support@tripit.com',
  'valerio.fallucca@ing.com',
  'No-Reply.Servizio.clienti@ayvens.com',
  'no-reply.servizio.clienti@ayvens.com'
)
OR email LIKE '%@edisonspa.it'
ORDER BY email;
